title: Poshan Tracker
description: Led backend modernization for a national public-health platform, improving reliability, scale, and response times for critical citizen services.
fullDescription: Worked on Poshan Tracker, a mission-critical government platform that supports nutrition governance at national scale. I helped modernize and scale the backend so it could serve millions of beneficiaries with higher reliability and lower operational overhead. The work included shipping high-throughput APIs, moving core workflows toward modular services, and improving database and integration performance for time-sensitive public services. The outcome was a platform that could better support large-scale usage while remaining resilient under real-world demand.

architectureNotes.detail: Split critical workflows into independently deployable services so growth in public usage would not force the entire platform to move in lockstep.
Leveraged DynamoDB for high-throughput operational records and Redis for hot reads so the platform could preserve low latency under heavy traffic.
Used asynchronous messaging and container-based deployment to reduce coupling and make failures easier to isolate and recover from.
Focused on observability and deployment discipline so the platform remained supportable in production with clear service boundaries and healthier release cycles.

title: Portfolio Website
description: Built a fast, searchable portfolio experience that presents my work clearly while keeping content easy to update through structured data.
fullDescription: Created a responsive portfolio that combines strong visual storytelling with developer-friendly content management. By structuring the content in JSON and rendering it into static HTML, the site remains easy to maintain while still offering a polished experience for recruiters, crawlers, and visitors. The result is a reliable personal brand presence that performs well across devices and remains simple to evolve over time.

architectureNotes.detail: Structured content as JSON and rendered it into static HTML so the site stays simple to maintain while remaining fast and predictable.
Kept the experience lightweight and cache-friendly to ensure quick loads and strong perceived performance for visitors and crawlers.
Separated content, templates, and styling so updates can be made safely without rewriting the front-end experience.

title: XIRR Calculator
description: Delivered a secure financial tool that helps users calculate complex investment returns with confidence and minimal friction.
fullDescription: Built a production-ready web application for XIRR calculations from irregular mutual fund cash flows. The system combines reliable financial logic with secure user workflows, including authentication, account lifecycle management, and protected data handling. The goal was to make a technically complex calculation approachable and trustworthy for end users while keeping the service robust and deployable in the cloud.

architectureNotes.detail: Designed the application around authenticated workflows, protected account management, and careful handling of sensitive financial data.
Focused on making a complex financial calculation approachable without sacrificing correctness or trust in the output.
Shipped the app with container-friendly deployment patterns so it could scale and evolve without tightly coupling it to a single environment.

title: DigiBot
description: Created an AI assistant that turns document collections into a conversational knowledge layer for faster, more accurate information access.
fullDescription: Built DigiBot to make large PDF-based knowledge sources easier to search and query. By combining retrieval-augmented generation with semantic search, the tool helps users find the most relevant context quickly and ask questions in natural language instead of manually reading through long documents. The project demonstrates how AI systems can improve information discoverability and reduce time spent navigating dense content.

architectureNotes.detail: Combined retrieval-enhanced generation with semantic search so questions could be answered from document context instead of shallow keyword matching.
Structured the system around retrieving the most relevant chunks of information so responses stayed grounded and easier to trust.
Kept the assistant modular so it could support more document types and richer workflows as the use case evolved.

title: NFC Payment Application
description: Explored secure mobile payments through NFC, focusing on trust, authentication, and safe user transactions in a real-world interaction model.
fullDescription: Developed a research-oriented Android application that demonstrates how contactless payment interactions can be built with strong security controls. The project focused on encrypted communication, user authentication, and transaction validation so the experience stayed practical while reflecting real security concerns in mobile payments. It showcases a strong foundation in secure application design and mobile engineering.

architectureNotes.detail: Built the experience around encrypted communication, strong authentication, and transaction validation to reflect real payment security concerns.
Used a modular structure to separate payment logic, authentication, and NFC communication so the design stayed understandable and maintainable.

title: Elite Creative Group
description: Delivered a polished digital presence for a creative agency, improving how the brand presented its work and services online.
fullDescription: Built a responsive business website that helped a creative agency communicate its identity more effectively. The project focused on a modern experience with clear navigation, engaging visuals, and a strong presentation of services and portfolio work. The result was a more professional online presence that made the brand easier to understand and more compelling to prospective clients.

architectureNotes.detail: Designed the experience around clear navigation, stronger content hierarchy, and a more persuasive presentation of services and work.
Kept the implementation simple and maintainable while still creating a polished, modern experience for a client-facing brand.
